titleStmt.title: SII 23.45: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 45. (A.R. No. 45 of 1907.) Tiruviśalūr, Kumbhakonam Taluk, Tanjavur District Śivayōganātha temple—on the north wall of the same maṇḍapa Rājēndra-Chōḷa I: year 3: 1014-15 A.D.

summary.p: This records a gift of 53 kāśu by a woman servant of the royal household by name Āyiravaṉ Kaṟṟaḷi, for burning a perpetual lamp and a twilight lamp in the temple respectively for the merit of her brother Vichchādiran Kuñjiramallan and mother Kārōgi. Out of this amount 3 mā and 3 kāṇi of land was purchased for 45 kāśu, the balance of 8 kāśu being deposited (for interest) with the dēvakanmis. Tiruviśalūr is here referred to as situated in Vēmbaṟṟūr alias Śōḻamārttāṇḍa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . kopparakecaripanmarāṉa śrīirājentrira coḻatevarkku yāṇṭu 3Āvatu vaṭakarai Irājentri ciṅkava
ḷanāṭṭu maṇṇināṭṭu brahmadeyam vempaṟṟūrākiya śrīcoḻamāttāṇṭa caturvetimaṅkalattu tiruvicalūr mā
tevarkku Āḻvār veḷattu peṇṭāṭṭi Āyiravaṉ kaṟṟaḷi taṉṉuṭap piṟan=ta viccātiraṉ kuñciramallaṉukkāka Oru tirunnāntā
viḷakku Erikkavum Eṉṉuṭaiya tāy kārokikku Irā tirunon=tā viḷakku Eriya vaitta viḷakku 5- kum nilam Ivūrile Idevar mula
brathya caṇṭeśvaradevar perāle nilam vilaikoṇṭu cantrā(ra)tittaval Eriya vaitta tirunon=tāviḷakku 1 Iviḷakkoṉṟiṉukku kācu 3 10 5
m viḷakku 5- ṉukku kācu 10 8- m Āka varakkāṭṭiṉa kācu 5 10 3 Ikācu 5 10 3ṟilum Ivūr jaṉanātacceri kaviciyaṉ coḻaṉ nārāyaṇaṉ pakkal
vilaikoṇṭa nilamāvatu Ivūr melpiṭākai śrījaṉanātavatikku kiḻakku migariaḻakiya coḻavāykkālukku teṟkku 3- Āṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu yi
raṇṭāñcaturattu koṇṭa paḻampaṭi nilam muṉṟumāmukkāṇiyi ṉukku vilaikuṭutta kācu nāṟppattaiñcu nikki Ivaḷ vaitta viḷakku Oṉṟaraiyiṉukku
m koḷḷa tevarkaṉmikaḷvacam kuṭutta kācu Eṭṭu Ipparicu cantrā(ā) dittaval viḷakkoṉṟaraiyum tevarkaṉmikaḷe Eriyppikka kka ṭavarkaḷ.
Digital edition of SII 23.45 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
